description: Install dependencies and configure transcription backend (local whisper-cli, OpenAI API, or Vercel AI Gateway)

--backend.description: Transcription backend. 'openai' and 'vercel' skip whisper-cli install; 'openai' requires OPENAI_API_KEY, 'vercel' requires AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY

--model.description: Model to use. Local: tiny, base, small, medium, large, large-v3-turbo. OpenAI: gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, whisper-1. Vercel: creator/model-name, e.g. openai/whisper-1

--language.description: Default language for transcription (ISO 639-1 code or 'auto')

whisper-cli.purpose: Local speech-to-text transcription engine (not needed for openai or vercel backends)

yt-dlp.purpose: Download video/audio from URLs (YouTube, Twitter, etc.)

ffmpeg.purpose: Audio cleaning, conversion, silence removal, noise reduction
